evidence.description: All 34 REQ-DX traceable to implementation+tests; 532/532 green; spec/impl field-name deviation (activeBalanceUnavailableReason) reconciled with recorded rationale and 2 dedicated tests.

Real catch-path network_error tests for defi (paid) and dex (free-but-networked); 18-catch-site grep regression test; precedence collision case (PROP-DX-013); balance-null vs real-zero distinction tested both ways.

commands --json returns the 18-command catalog via zod introspection; rpc bad-network exit 2 usage_error; defi budget-gate exit 2 budget_exceeded with byte-identical cli-budget.json before/after (no spend).

Core/shell split preserved: introspection/classification pure core; wallet reason in shell; money path (budget.ts, manual-x402.ts, gatePaidCall/reverify wiring) diff-audited unchanged by adversary it1.
semgrep over 9 files: 1 false-positive only (hasStatus literal-only call sites); no exec/eval/secrets; docs-check 18/18; typecheck clean.
